common.tagline: Solo Immigration Counsel With Direct Attorney Access
common.description: Boutique U.S. immigration representation for visitor, student, family, humanitarian, and urgent court-related matters. Clear strategy, transparent fees, and direct attorney communication.

hero.badge: Solo attorney practice with direct case ownership
hero.title: Focused immigration counsel
hero.subtitle: Boutique support for visitor, student, family-based, humanitarian, and urgent removal matters, with direct attorney communication from intake through filing.

stats.directAttorneyDesc: You speak with the lawyer responsible for strategy and filing decisions.
stats.caseReadyDesc: Structured intake helps surface deadlines, filings, and urgent issues early.
stats.securityDesc: Forms and chat now run through validated server-side routes with rate limiting.
stats.virtualDesc: Consultations can be handled remotely for clients across the United States.

process.title: How We Work
process.heading: A clear legal process, without the volume-firm confusion.
process.subtitle: The practice is built around one attorney owning the file, the strategy, and the communication from first consult through the filing decision.
process.step1Desc: Start with a paid consultation to identify the issue, deadlines, and the cleanest next step.
process.step2Desc: Build the filing strategy, assemble supporting evidence, and prepare the submission with care.
process.step3Desc: Stay prepared after filing with interview preparation, response strategy, and direct follow-up.

services.title: Our Expertise
services.heading: Focused immigration matters, handled with a clear filing plan.
services.subtitle: From straightforward visa filings to urgent court-sensitive issues, the practice centers on preparation, candid risk assessment, and direct communication.

whyChooseUs.title: Why Choose M&T
whyChooseUs.heading: Solo-practice attention. Clear legal judgment.
whyChooseUs.heading2: Built for the matters people actually lose sleep over.
whyChooseUs.reason1Desc: The same attorney owns the case strategy from consultation through the next filing decision.
whyChooseUs.reason2Desc: Urgent interviews, court dates, and government response deadlines are treated with priority.
whyChooseUs.reason3Desc: Consultations, filing work, and next steps are framed in plain language before work begins.
whyChooseUs.reason4Desc: The site now validates submissions, keeps the AI key server-side, and rate-limits public forms.

testimonials.title: Client Experience
testimonials.heading: What a strong solo practice should deliver.
testimonials.subtitle: Instead of unverifiable testimonials, the site now focuses on the standards clients should reasonably expect from a boutique immigration practice.
testimonials.straight: Straight answers on price and scope

about.title: About
about.heading: A boutique immigration practice built for direct communication
about.quote: Immigration cases are too important to disappear into a volume practice. You should know who is guiding the strategy, what the next filing is, and where the risks are.
about.description: M&T is framed as a focused solo practice for clients who want thoughtful preparation, straight answers, and direct access to the attorney handling the work.

pricing.title: Transparent Fees
pricing.heading: Clear legal fees for focused representation.
pricing.subtitle: Ranges vary by complexity, urgency, and document load. The goal is to show realistic legal-fee bands before you book.
pricing.note: Note: These are legal service ranges only. Government filing fees, translations, and third-party costs are separate unless specifically stated in writing.

faq.title: Common Questions
faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions.
faq.subtitle: Clear answers about process, pricing, and what to expect before you commit to the next step.

contact.title: Get Started
contact.heading: Ready to review your matter?
contact.subtitle: Book a consultation or send a structured intake request. The office responds to new inquiries within 1-2 business days.
contact.feeCredit: Fee credited toward service if retained.

cta.title: Ready to Start?
cta.heading: Your immigration strategy starts with a real case review.
cta.subtitle: Don't hand a high-stakes immigration matter to a generic intake funnel. Start with a focused consultation and a clear next step from an attorney-led practice.

footer.tagline: Boutique, attorney-led immigration representation with direct communication, transparent fees, and focused case strategy.
footer.disclaimer: ATTORNEY ADVERTISING. The information on this website is for general information purposes only. Nothing on this site should be taken as legal advice for any individual case or situation. This information is not intended to create, and receipt or viewing does not constitute, an attorney-client relationship. Prior results do not guarantee a similar outcome.
